district.name: Community Consolidated School District 46
sourceNotes: CCSD 46 home page describes service to seven communities in northeastern Illinois and district office contact information.

schools.name: Prairieview School
schools.reportedEnrollment: source page lists enrollment; verify current value

schools.name: Early childhood center
schools.reportedEnrollment: 155 director/student-services line in extracted official page; verify specific facility

district.studentPopulation: Official CCSD page says diverse population of over 4,000 students, teachers, administrators, and support staff; U.S. News reports 3,667 students, minority enrollment 50%, economically disadvantaged 34.2%. Use Illinois Report Card for authoritative student demographics before publication.

board.structure: Board of Education members are elected for four-year terms by community members residing within CCSD 46 boundaries.
board.meetingCadence: Generally twice a month, with one meeting per month during summer.

electionMechanics.jurisdiction: Illinois consolidated school board election; verify final calendar with Lake County Clerk and Illinois State Board of Elections.
electionMechanics.computedEarliestCirculationEstimate: 2026-09-22 (90 days before estimated filing deadline; verify official calendar)
electionMechanics.petitionRule: IASB candidate information: nominating petition signed by at least 50 registered voters or 10% of voters, whichever is less; verify office-specific forms and signature count with election authority.
requiredPapersChecklist: Campaign finance committee setup if thresholds/activities trigger reporting
filingAuthorities: local election official rules as applicable

strategicPlanSignals: financial transparency and alignment of financial decision-making to district goals
Master Facilities Plan / equitable quality learning environments
Master Technology Plan / equitable technology-rich learning environments
communication consistency and transparency with stakeholders
